data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified user interface helps reduce the complexity and time required for user decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Minimal interface designs and intuitive navigation paths.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Target size and distance are optimized to facilitate quicker user interactions and improve engagement.
data.technical_spec: Key interactive elements are appropriately sized and placed for optimal accessibility.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Design accommodates short-term memory limitations by organizing information into chunks.
data.technical_spec: Clear segmentation of information in lists, playlists, and user suggestions.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: A visually pleasing interface is designed to improve perceived usability and user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes, typography, and layout designs.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Content presentation leverages primacy and recency by positioning important information first or last.
data.technical_spec: Video recommendations and play queues are ordered for maximum impact.
